failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local train-only continuous k-nearest analog memory with abstention-first US100 M5 schedule replay
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0005 work must change a meaningful analog model, feature, label, calibration, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0001 by only nudging neighbor count, analog distance, positive lift, daily max entries, stop, target, hold, or session thresholds
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 8 losing folds, 1 profitable fold, negative total tick net PnL, and negative proxy plus MT5 tick profitability despite target-range entry frequency

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar schedule replay parity passed, while tick execution worsened total net PnL by 8.33 versus logic and changed total trade count by -5; tick execution remains the economic surface.
Continuous analog memory achieved 7.860345 entries per active day but did not create profitable fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether fold-local continuous nearest-neighbor analog memory can rank US100 M5 entry candidates better than discrete state archetype buckets by using train-only local outcome neighborhoods
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: first C0005 true variant; changes model family, feature representation, score interpretation, and entry selection from discrete regimes, score cells, path-exit rules, synthesis constraints, or state archetype buckets to continuous train-fold analog retrieval; not a threshold, window, stop, target, hold, session, top-count, or retry nudge

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must fit analog memory only inside each rolling train window
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 validation is attempted
proxy must report analog diagnostics without creating selected claims
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure
repair mechanical parity before any hypothesis judgment when mismatch is found

feature.summary: continuous directional momentum, trend, range, compression, range-position, body, close-location, session-cycle, and spread-pressure features; no feature set is selected

label.summary: directional target-before-stop plus forward path-quality label used only inside train folds for analog outcome scoring; no label is selected

model.summary: fold-local k-nearest continuous analog memory model using standardized closed-bar feature vectors and train-only local outcome neighborhoods; no model family is selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot discovery schedule selects highest analog-score candidates per active day with spacing and schedule replay for MT5 validation
